notes: References in TextThe Demonstration Cities and Metropolitan Development Act of 1966, referred to in subsec. (a), is , , . Title I of the Act was classified principally to subchapter I (§ 3301 et seq.) of chapter 41 of this title, and was omitted from the Code pursuant to this section which terminated authority to make grants or loans under such title I after . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. children.heading: Prohibition on new grants or loans after ; exceptionsJanuary 1, 1975
children.label: a Prohibition on new grants or loans after ; exceptionsJanuary 1, 1975
children.text: Except with respect to projects and programs for which funds have been previously committed, no new grants or loans shall be made after , under (1) title I of the Demonstration Cities and Metropolitan Development Act of 1966 [ et seq.], (2) title I of the Housing Act of 1949 [ et seq.] (3) section 702 or section 703 of the Housing and Urban Development Act of 1965 [ or 3103], (4) title II of the Housing Amendments of 1955 [ et seq.], or (5) title VII of the Housing Act of 1961 [ et seq.].January 1, 197542 U.S.C. 330142 U.S.C. 145042 U.S.C. 310242 U.S.C. 149142 U.S.C. 1500

children.heading: Final date in fiscal year for submission of application for grant; establishment by Secretary
children.label: b Final date in fiscal year for submission of application for grant; establishment by Secretary
children.text: In the case of funds available for any fiscal year, the Secretary shall not consider any statement under , unless such statement is submitted on or prior to such date as the Secretary shall establish as the final date for submission of statements for that year.section 5304(a) of this title
